description:
You are a clinical neuropsychologist building a computerized spatial attention assessment for post-stroke patients. Create a complete Posner spatial cueing experiment in PsychoPy Builder, consisting of a conditions file and an experiment file saved to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/.

The conditions file, posner_conditions.csv, must contain at least 12 rows covering combinations of cue types (left, right, none), target locations (left, right), and SOAs (0.3 and 0.8 seconds). It must include columns for cue_direction, target_location, validity (valid, invalid, or neutral), correct_resp ('z' for left, 'm' for right), and soa.

The experiment file, posner_cueing.psyexp, must implement a flow including instructions, a fixation period (0.5-1.0s), a cue routine driven by the $cue_direction variable, a target routine (displaying a stimulus at +/- 0.5 X-coordinates based on $target_location and recording 'z'/'m' responses), trial feedback, and a concluding message. The experiment must feature a practice loop followed by a main trials loop that references posner_conditions.csv. Ensure the target routine utilizes $correct_resp for accuracy scoring and maintains static placeholder markers at both potential target locations. Save both files to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/.
